title_zh: 推理效率革命：从堆算力到拼算法，AI 产业的范式拐点
title_en: The Inference Efficiency Revolution: From Stacking Compute to Squeezing Algorithms
subtitle_zh: DSpark 单用户提速 85%、整体吞吐 +400%、Coinbase 切换国产开源后 AI 支出砍半——一场被低估的「软件层逆袭」正在重构 AI 价值链。
subtitle_en: DSpark boosts single-user speed by 85%, total throughput by 4x, and Coinbase halves AI spend after defaulting to Chinese open-source models — an underrated software-layer counterattack is rewriting the AI value chain.
summary_zh: DSpark 单用户提速 60%–85%、整体吞吐量 +400%、Coinbase 切换 GLM 5.2 + Kimi K2.7 后 AI 支出砍半——本文从产业主线、技术原理、商业案例与产业链影响四个层面，拆解 AI 产业为何从「堆算力」彻底转向「拼推理效率」。
summary_en: DSpark delivers 60-85% single-user speedup and 4x total throughput, while Coinbase halves AI spend by switching to GLM 5.2 + Kimi K2.7. This article unpacks why AI competition has pivoted from stacking compute to squeezing inference efficiency, through industry trends, technical principles, business cases and supply-chain implications.
